metadata_information.title: Hospital management staffing and training issues
metadata_information.version: Python script, from D&R API, generated on 2026-03-19

title_statement.title: Hospital management staffing and training issues

document_description.abstract: Hospitals dominate health care in most parts of the world and for a variety of reasons are likely to continue being a key factor in the overall performance of the health care system. Any efforts to improve this performance must therefore give greater hospital efficiency the highest priority. After discussing key issues of managerial, clinical, and production efficiency, this paper suggests an agenda for the most useful areas of research.
